title: Journey to ancient Egypt through dance
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Carmen's School of Dance...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Carmen's School of Dance marked the end of the year with a memorable year-end production, celebrating months of achievement across competitions, performances, and international ballet examinations.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Carmen's School of Dance marked the end of the year with a memorable year-end production, celebrating months of achievement across competitions, performances, and international ballet examinations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The two-day show was hosted at the Knysna High School Hall on Friday and Saturday, 5 and 6 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This annual showcase allowed every dancer to step into the spotlight, demonstrating technical progress, dedication, artistry, and love of dance.","html":"This annual showcase allowed every dancer to step into the spotlight, demonstrating technical progress, dedication, artistry, and love of dance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's production, themed Time of the Netjeru, transported audiences to the world of ancient Egypt, drawing inspiration from its mythology and belief systems.","html":"This year's production, themed Time of the Netjeru, transported audiences to the world of ancient Egypt, drawing inspiration from its mythology and belief systems."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Students explored the rich creative landscape the theme offered, and infused each role with expression and personal interpretation.","html":"Students explored the rich creative landscape the theme offered, and infused each role with expression and personal interpretation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"From the beginners to the students preparing to graduate, they brought timeless stories to life for an appreciative audience of family, friends and supporters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It was a spectacular finale to a remarkable year - one that beautifully reflected the spirit, passion, and commitment that define Carmen's School of Dance,\" said the dance school owner and founder, Carmen de Sousa.","html":"\"It was a spectacular finale to a remarkable year - one that beautifully reflected the spirit, passion, and commitment that define Carmen's School of Dance,\" said the dance school owner and founder, Carmen de Sousa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Journey to ancient Egypt through dance
